title: Benjamin Rivard
content:
People.ContactEmail brivard@mccarthy.ca
- British Columbia, 2025
Benjamin Rivard is an associate in McCarthy Tétrault's Business Law Group. His practice focuses on mergers and acquisitions, infrastructure project implementation, tendering processes, commercial transactions, corporate law and corporate governance. He is involved in mandates in a wide range of industries, including energy, mining, construction and infrastructure.
Involved in the legal community, he served on the Canadian Bar Association's Futures in Law subcommittee and was a member of its Board of Directors of the Quebec Branch from 2019 to 2021. He was also a member of the Board of Directors of the Regina Assumpta College Foundation.
Benjamin studied civil law and common law at McGill University. He also completed a graduate microprogram in business management at the Université de Sherbrooke. During his studies, he was editor-in-chief of the McGill Journal of Law and Health.
Benjamin was called to the Quebec Bar in 2021, the New York State Bar in 2024 and the British Columbia Bar in 2025.
